rulings.Case Title: CAITLIN FITTING et al VS. PAUL KRAAIJVANGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 28, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANTs PAUL KRAAIJVANGER and REAL EQUITY GROUP ONE, LLC's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED. Judgment is set aside. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: SHELDON FONG VS. EAST WEST BANK
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 28, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANTs LEW, FONG, LEUNG LEE & CHAN, P.C. and NORMAN LEW's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to the eight cause of action for legal malpractice for Plaintiff to allege facts supporting each element of this cause of action. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: LALEH S. ZELINSKY VS. DAVID KAPLAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Ptlf'S Motion To Expunge And/Or Cancel Recorded Instruments
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 28, 2014, line 3. PLAINTIFF LALEH ZELINSKY's Motion To Expunge And/Or Cancel Recorded Instruments GRANTED, no opposition filed. Prevailing party prepare order modifying the last paragraph of the proposed order to limit recordings as to the premises at issue only. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: BAY AREA PROPERTIES, LTD. et al VS. PETER OGILVIE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Orders Expunging And Cancelling Fals And Fraudulent Documents Recorded By Defts As Being Null And Void
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 28, 2014, line 4. PLAINTIFFs BAY AREA PROPERTIES, LTD. and DAVID KAPLAN's Motion For Orders Expunging And Cancelling False And Fraudulent Documents Recorded By Defendants As Being Null And Void GRANTED, no opposition filed. Prevailing party prepare order modifying the last paragraph of the proposed order to limit recordings as to the premises at issue only. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTY STYER VS. DAVID JAH et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 28, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT DAVID JAH's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges forcible detainer per CCP 1160(1). Defendant improperly raises issues of fact on demurrer. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTY STYER VS. DAVID JAH et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 28, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT DAVID JAH's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. = (501/AJR)
